name: Latrobe Magnesium Limited
description: Latrobe Magnesium Limited is an Australian-based company focused on developing a magnesium production plant in Victoria's Latrobe Valley. Utilizing a world-first patented hydrometallurgical extraction process, the company aims to produce magnesium metal from industrial fly ash, a waste byproduct of brown coal power generation. This environmentally sustainable approach significantly reduces carbon emissions compared to traditional production methods. The project positions Latrobe Magnesium as a key supplier of high-purity magnesium to global markets, supporting industries such as automotive and aerospace while addressing waste management challenges.
